# Juan Manuel Garcia — Market & BI Analyst

> Bilingual (EN/ES) Market and Business Intelligence Analyst based in Miami, FL.
> Specializing in commercial data strategy, Power BI, and SQL automation.
> Available for hire — STEM OPT authorized through 2027.

## Who I Am

Juan Manuel Garcia is a bilingual (English/Spanish) Market and Business Intelligence Analyst
currently based in Miami, Florida. He combines technical data skills with commercial strategy
to help companies understand their markets, measure performance, and grow profitability.

He holds a B.S. in Computer Information Systems & Computer Science from Missouri Valley College
(2024, GPA 3.3, Minor in Business Administration) and a Specialist certification in Artificial
Intelligence for Business Applications from Racks Academy, Spain (2025).

He is authorized to work in the United States under STEM OPT through 2027, with potential
H-1B sponsorship eligibility.

## Current Role

**Market & Business Intelligence Analyst — AMG Global Distribution, Miami FL**
September 2024 – Present

- Leads development of Power BI dashboards connected to SQL Server and Sage ERP
- Automated SKU-level profitability tracking, improving data accuracy by 25%
- Integrated domestic and international sales data for executive-level reporting
- Reduced report generation time by 80% through end-to-end automation
- Applies commercial strategy frameworks to translate data into business decisions

## Core Skills

### Technical
- **BI & Visualization:** Power BI, DAX, Dashboard Design, Report Automation
- **Data & Databases:** SQL Server, CTEs, Views, Data Modeling, Data Cleaning
- **Cloud & Analytics:** Azure Log Analytics, KQL (Kusto Query Language), Power BI Service
- **ERP Integration:** Sage ERP → SQL pipelines
- **Other Tools:** Excel, Notion, Python (basic)

### Business & Strategy
- Market analysis and commercial intelligence
- KPI definition and performance measurement
- Sales forecasting and margin tracking
- Workflow optimization and process documentation (SOPs)
- Stakeholder reporting and executive communication

## Key Projects

### 1. Sales & Profitability Dashboard — AMG Global Distribution
Real-time Power BI dashboard connected to SQL Server via Sage ERP integration.
Enabled domestic vs. international sales forecasting. Reduced reporting time 80%.
Improved data accuracy 25%+ by eliminating manual Excel workflows.
**Stack:** SQL Server · Power BI · DAX · Sage ERP · Excel

### 2. BI Usage Tracking System (KQL / Azure)
Built a report adoption tracking system using KQL scripts against Power BI Activity Logs.
Identified underutilized reports and provided adoption data to management.
**Stack:** KQL · Azure Log Analytics · Power BI Service

### 3. Operations & Request Log — Workflow Optimization
Kanban-style intake system in Notion to track data requests and document SOPs.
Improved BI function visibility and justified strategic project time allocation.
**Stack:** Notion · SOP Writing · Task Management

## Education

  Minor: Business Administration | GPA: 3.3
- **Specialist in Artificial Intelligence** — Racks Academy, Spain (2025)
  Focus: AI for Business Applications
